ValidationRule.description: This VR will check to see if Same As Billing Address or Same As Shipping Address is blank on the Opportunity
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL( StageName , 'Waiting For Approval'), SameAsShippingAddress__c = FALSE, SameAsBillingAddress__c = FALSE, RecordType.Name = 'Medication' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Same As Shipping Address or Same As Billing Address is blank on this Opportunity. Please select one.
